memetale RPG executable output
=============================

This folder stores packaged executable artifacts.

Current target:
- memetale-rpg.jar

How to build:
- macOS/Linux: ./build-release.sh
- Windows: build-release.bat

How to run:
- java -jar dist/memetale-rpg.jar

Important:
- Run from the project root so assets can be found:
  image/, music/, sound/, Stickers/
